name: AI Agents (Copilot CLI + Claude Code)
initializeCommand: mkdir -p .devcontainer/.host-auth && cp -r ${HOME}/.config/github-copilot .devcontainer/.host-auth/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r ${HOME}/.copilot .devcontainer/.host-auth/dot-copilot 2>/dev/null; cp -r ${HOME}/.config/gh .devcontainer/.host-auth/gh 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p .devcontainer/.host-auth/dot-claude && for f in config.json settings.json credentials.json mcp-config.json; do cp ${HOME}/.claude/$f .devcontainer/.host-auth/dot-claude/ 2>/dev/null; done; gh auth token > .devcontainer/.host-auth/gh-token 2>/dev/null; true
